cells.rationale: Judgment-heavy and under-specified: the F2 reconcile requires choosing between a lease adopt-and-release behavior change vs a SKILL.md amend, and the bulk is delicate saga-test idiom-matching behind a pure git seam across many typed lease-exit paths — contract-touching (lease-release) work, but no nameable opus reason since daemon reclaim already self-heals the behavior.

Well-specified acceptance but correctness-invariant-sensitive: picking a durable/live-derived prior-residue signal that keeps the sweep producer-only and re-fold-safe is delicate keeper event-sourcing idiom where a wrong state-signal choice reintroduces the history-growing-fold hazard, so route to the workhorse rather than GPT-first.
